Package index

Spec Data Objects

All exported spec_* data objects. Each version of a condition or drug class is a distinct _vX-named object. Composite specs contain named versioned components accessible via component= (or component = "all" to union everything). Print any spec to see its definitions and component names.

spec_objects spec_antidepressive spec_antidiabetic spec_asthma_v1 spec_antihypertensive spec_antiobesity spec_ascvd spec_ckd_v1 spec_copd_v1 spec_depression_v1 spec_depression_v2 spec_diabetes_v1 spec_diabetes_v2 spec_diabetes_v3 spec_hf_v1 spec_htn_v1 spec_htn_v2 spec_hyperlipidemia_v1 spec_isch_stroke_v1 spec_obesity_v1 spec_ohs_v1 spec_osa_v1
Condition and Drug Code Specification Objects

Conditions: Cardiovascular

Hypertension (v1, v2), heart failure (v1), and the ASCVD composite. ASCVD components (chd_v1, chd_v2, stroke_v1, isch_stroke_v1, hf_v1, cerebrovasc_disease_v1) are accessible via get_ascvd_codes(component = ...).

get_htn_v1_codes() get_htn_v2_codes()
Retrieve ICD codes for hypertension
get_htn_v1_defs() get_htn_v2_defs()
Retrieve the narrative algorithm description for hypertension (v1)
get_hf_v1_codes()
Retrieve ICD codes for heart failure
get_hf_v1_defs()
Retrieve the narrative algorithm description for heart failure (v1)
get_ascvd_codes()
Retrieve codes for a named ASCVD component
get_ascvd_defs()
Retrieve the narrative algorithm description for an ASCVD component

Conditions: Metabolic & Renal

Obesity (v1), diabetes (v1–v3), hyperlipidemia (v1), and CKD (v1).

get_obesity_v1_codes() get_obesity_v1_defs()
Retrieve ICD codes for obesity
get_diabetes_v1_codes() get_diabetes_v1_defs() get_diabetes_v2_codes() get_diabetes_v2_defs() get_diabetes_v3_codes() get_diabetes_v3_defs()
Retrieve ICD codes for diabetes mellitus
get_hyperlipidemia_v1_codes() get_hyperlipidemia_v1_defs()
Retrieve ICD codes for hyperlipidemia
get_ckd_v1_codes() get_ckd_v1_defs()
Retrieve ICD codes for chronic kidney disease

Conditions: Respiratory

COPD (v1) and sleep apnea (v1).

get_copd_v1_codes() get_copd_v1_defs()
Retrieve ICD codes for COPD
get_osa_v1_codes() get_osa_v1_defs()
Retrieve ICD codes for sleep apnea
get_ohs_v1_codes() get_ohs_v1_defs()
Retrieve ICD codes for obesity hypoventilation syndrome
get_asthma_v1_codes() get_asthma_v1_defs()
Retrieve ICD codes for asthma

Conditions: Mental Health

Depression history (v1: diagnosis only; v2: diagnosis or antidepressive medication).

get_depression_v1_codes() get_depression_v1_defs() get_depression_v2_codes() get_depression_v2_defs()
Retrieve ICD codes for depression

Drugs: Antihypertensives

ACE/ARBs, Beta-blockers, CCBs, diuretics, renin inhibitors, etc.

get_antihypertensive_generics()
Retrieve generic drug names for antihypertensive medications
get_antihypertensive_codes() get_antihypertensive_defs() get_antidiabetic_codes() get_antidiabetic_defs()
Miscellaneous drug accessor functions

Drugs: Antidiabetics

Biguanides, sulfonylureas, meglitinides, TZDs, alpha-glucosidase inhibitors, DPP-4, SGLT-2, GLP-1, insulin, etc.

get_antidiabetic_generics()
Retrieve generic drug names for antidiabetic medications
get_antihypertensive_codes() get_antihypertensive_defs() get_antidiabetic_codes() get_antidiabetic_defs()
Miscellaneous drug accessor functions

Drugs: Antiobesity

Non-GLP-1 agents (non_glp1_v1: naltrexone/bupropion, orlistat) and GLP-1 receptor agonists (glp1_v1: exenatide, dulaglutide, semaglutide, liraglutide, tirzepatide).

get_antiobesity_generics() get_antiobesity_codes() get_antiobesity_defs()
Retrieve generic drug names for antiobesity medications

Drugs: Antidepressives

SSRIs (ssri_v1), SNRIs (snri_v1), tricyclics (tca_v1), MAOIs (maoi_v1), and other/atypical agents (other_v1).

get_antidepressive_generics() get_antidepressive_codes() get_antidepressive_defs()
Retrieve generic drug names for antidepressive medications

General Accessor

Low-level dispatcher that works on any spec object directly.

get_defs()
Retrieve and display the narrative algorithm description

Custom Spec API

Build your own code or drug specifications from scratch, or non-destructively modify any bundled spec.

code_spec()
Create a user-defined condition code specification
drug_spec()
Create a user-defined drug class specification
add_codes()
Add codes to a condition code specification
remove_codes()
Remove codes from a condition code specification
modify_code_spec()
Modify a condition code specification
modify_drug_spec()
Modify a drug class specification

ICD-10-PCS Utilities

Expand ICD-10-PCS prefix patterns (e.g., "0210xxx") to all matching valid 7-character codes using the FY2026 CMS reference table.

expand_pcs()
Expand ICD-10-PCS prefix patterns to all matching valid codes

R6 Spec Classes

Underlying R6 classes used by all spec objects. Useful when building custom specs programmatically.

CodeSpec
R6 class for medical condition code specifications
DrugSpec
R6 class for drug class specifications
CompositeCodeSpec
R6 class for composite condition code specifications
CompositeDrugSpec
R6 class for composite drug class specifications

On this page

Developed by Perisphere RWE — health outcomes, epidemiology and biostatistics consulting.
